context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet game where player cares for Echo the cockatiel
context.role: Food item that Echo consumes, appears in food bowl
context.screen_position: Inside food bowl at x=16-30px, y=102-110px. Multiple seeds (3-8) appear based on food_level
adjacent_elements: echo_eating (Echo consumes seeds during eating animation)
speech_bubble (seed icon appears in bubble when Echo is hungry)
context.usage_scenario: Player taps feed button to fill food bowl with 6-8 seeds. Echo eats seeds one at a time during eating animation. Seeds disappear as food_level decreases. Also appears as 3x3px icon inside speech bubble during hungry state.

visual_specification.shape: Small irregular oval/ellipse representing a millet seed. 3x3px with slightly irregular edges to appear organic.
visual_specification.texture: Pure pixel art, simple solid color with optional 1px highlight

animation.description: Static sprite. Individual seeds may be positioned at different angles (rotated 90/180/270 degrees) for variety when multiple appear in bowl.

visual_specification.details: 3x3px irregular oval. Primary color #FFA300. Optional: 1 pixel of #FFEC27 as highlight on top-left to suggest roundness. When in bowl: 6-8 seeds for full, 3-4 seeds for low, 0 seeds for empty. Seeds positioned randomly within bowl bounds. When in speech bubble: single centered seed icon.

relationships.shared_with: Same golden color (#FFA300) as Echo's body
relationships.differences_from: Unlike poop: golden color (not brown), appears in bowl (not floor), consumed by Echo. Unlike particles: static object, not animated.
